holdings.name: HDFC Bank
holdings.description: Highest ESG score among Indian private banks. Consistently rated 'AA' by MSCI ESG Research. Strong governance — independent board majority, no promoter concentration risk. GHG emissions from banking operations declining. Green bond issuances financing renewable energy projects.

holdings.name: Infosys
holdings.description: Carbon neutral since 2020 — Infosys achieved net-zero GHG across Scope 1+2 before most Indian peers. 100% renewable electricity in India operations (rooftop solar, wind). Infosys ESG Vision 2030: water neutrality, zero-waste to landfill. DJSI ranked 99th percentile in IT Services.

holdings.name: Tata Consultancy Services
holdings.description: TCS' ESG credentials: carbon net-zero by 2030 commitment backed by Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). 100% paper-free operations in key offices. Diversity: 35%+ women workforce. Community empowerment: BridgeIT digital literacy (5M+ students trained).

holdings.name: Asian Paints
holdings.description: ESG leader in manufacturing. 73% renewable energy in manufacturing. Zero liquid discharge plants. Water-based (VOC-free) paints gaining share vs solvent-based. MSCI ESG 'BBB' rated. Supply chain traceability from raw material to end consumer.

holdings.name: Wipro
holdings.description: 100% renewable electricity commitment. Wipro Earthian programme — sustainability education across 4,000+ schools. Water-positive operations (recover more water than consumed). EcoEnergy savings ₹100+ Cr annually. CDP Climate 'A-' rated.

holdings.name: Hindustan Unilever
holdings.description: Part of Unilever global Sustainable Living Plan. 100% plastic recyclability target by 2025. Water saved in production: 300Mn litres. Women empowerment (Shakti Program): 200,000+ rural women entrepreneurs. Greenhouse gas halved in manufacturing vs 2010 baseline.
